name: Chicago Deep-Dish Pizza
recipeInstructions:
1. On a lightly floured surface, let dough stand at room temperature for 1 hour.
2. Remove casing from sausage. Brown sausage; drain.
3. Add onions and cook until tender.
4. Stir in tomatoes, tomato paste, Parmesan cheese, and seasoning; simmer 15 minutes.
5. Roll dough to a 15 x 11 inch rectangle. Press onto the bottom and 1 inch up the sides of a greased 13 x 9 baking pan.
6. Spread half of the mozzarella cheese and tomato mixture over the dough.
7. Repeat layers with remaining ingredients.
8. Bake at 425 degrees for 20 minutes.
9. Sprinkle with additional Parmesan cheese, if desired.
10. Let stand 15 minutes before serving.
Options:
Add 1 cup mushroom slices and 1/2 cup chopped green peppers with onions.
Add 1 teaspoon fennel seed to the meat mixture.
Serves 8.
